market_context: Markets face hot PPI data pushing yields to 2026 highs, while tech leads with Nvidia surging on China trip news. Oil remains elevated near $101-106 amid Iran war tensions.

predictions.reasoning: Strong tech momentum with Nasdaq futures up 0.2% and semiconductor sector rallying on Nvidia China news. Despite hot PPI data, tech stocks have shown resilience to rate concerns given AI demand backdrop.

Strong premarket gains of 2.4% on Jensen Huang joining Trump's China delegation. This signals potential easing of export restrictions and access to Chinese markets, a major positive catalyst for the stock.

Dow underperforming with 5-day decline of 0.4% and pressure from rising yields hitting rate-sensitive sectors. Hot PPI data reinforces hawkish Fed expectations, weighing on traditional blue-chip stocks.

Oil prices remain elevated with WTI above $100 and Brent near $106 due to Iran war supply disruptions. IEA warned inventories falling at record pace, supporting energy sector despite broader market uncertainty.

Hot PPI data pushed 10-year yields to 2026 highs at 4.48%, with bond auction showing tepid demand. Rising rate hike odds and reduced 2026 cut expectations create strong headwinds for long-term Treasuries.
